recommendations.title: Election
recommendations.overview: After losing an election to become chairman of the Wo Lin Shing triad, a gang leader lashes out and tries to seize the dragon-head baton, the official symbol of a chairman's authority.

recommendations.title: Drug War
recommendations.overview: A drug cartel boss is arrested in a raid and coerced into betraying his former accomplices as part of an undercover operation.

recommendations.title: Throw Down
recommendations.overview: A former Judo champion is given the chance to redeem himself after he befriends a competitor and an aspiring singer.

recommendations.title: Exiled
recommendations.overview: A friendship is formed between an ex-gangster, and two groups of hitmen - those who want to protect him and those who were sent to kill him.

recommendations.title: Vengeance
recommendations.overview: A French chef swears revenge after a violent attack on his daughter's family in Macau, during which her husband and her two children are murdered. To help him find the killers, he hires three local hit-men working for the mafia.

recommendations.title: The Mission
recommendations.overview: Triad boss Lung, who has just escaped being killed in an assassination attempt hires the killers Curtis, James, Mike, Roy and Shin for his protection.

recommendations.title: Mad Detective
recommendations.overview: Bun, a schizophrenic, former police inspector comes out of retirement to help a rookie detective solve a complex murder case involving a missing colleague and a suspected policeman suffering from a multiple personality disorder.

recommendations.title: Running Out of Time
recommendations.overview: Police inspector and excellent hostage negotiator Ho Sheung-Sang finds himself in over his head when he is pulled into a 72 hour game by a cancer suffering criminal out for vengeance on Hong Kong's organized crime syndicates.

recommendations.title: The Heroic Trio
recommendations.genres: Action, Fantasy, Thriller, Adventure, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: While one tough woman with an invisible robe has stolen 18 babies for her powerful master, two other tough women and the cops try to stop her.

recommendations.title: Fulltime Killer
